steps.label: Allocate new array (2× capacity)
steps.note: Create new array with double capacity

visuals.title: Amortized Cost Analysis
visuals.description: Why append is O(1) amortized despite occasional O(n) resizes

visuals.description: How dynamic array stores data with size and capacity

visuals.title: Growth Factor Comparison
visuals.description: Space usage with different growth factors

data.note: Higher factor = fewer resizes but more wasted space

visuals.title: Why Shrink at 1/4, Not 1/2?
visuals.description: Avoiding thrashing with proper shrink threshold

steps.label: Bad: Shrink at 1/2
steps.visual:
Cap=8, Size=4 → Add → Cap=8, Size=5
→ Remove → Cap=4, Size=4 (shrink!)
→ Add → Cap=8, Size=5 (grow!)
→ Remove → Cap=4, Size=4 (shrink!)
... infinite loop!

steps.label: Good: Shrink at 1/4
steps.visual:
Cap=8, Size=4 → Remove → Cap=8, Size=3
→ Remove → Cap=8, Size=2 (shrink to 4)
→ Add → Cap=4, Size=3
→ Add → Cap=4, Size=4
→ Add → Cap=8, Size=5 (grow)
